cs:art1:hero.title: Playground
cs:art1:hero.description: A collection of fun and modern hand-drawn illustrations inspired bysome of my favorite phrases and movies, featuring bold typography and playful artistic details for a unique, personal vibe.

cs:art1:sections.heading: Separate, expose, over-print.
cs:art1:sections.body: Each piece is hand-separated into layers, then printed one colour at a time. The fun is in the overlaps — where pink crosses blue you get a third colour the screen could never show you.

cs:art1:sections.text: I keep a stack of the “mistakes” — half of them are better than the plan.
cs:art1:sections.author: Pri
